.file-embed.background: rgb(7, 24, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #306850 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#306850, color-mix(in srgb, #306850 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #306850 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#306850, color-mix(in srgb, #306850 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(7, 24, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(7, 24, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(48, 104, 80, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(7, 24, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(7, 24, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
